summary: 64 TDD test cases across 13 test classes. All fail with ModuleNotFoundError. Covers: schema creation, CRUD, alias search (case-insensitive, cross-script, word-reorder), unique constraints, FK cascade, script detection, list-all with filters, dynamic alias addition, resolve_agent_norm_to_authority_ids. Fixtures: Maimonides, Buxtorf, Mendelssohn, Karo.
